summary: Portability feature testing completed successfully. All portability-related features work correctly in both Admin Ativacoes page and Self-Service /ativar page. Backend APIs accept portability fields, portability status endpoint works, and Chips page search filters correctly.

console_warnings.warning: Maximum update depth exceeded. This can happen when a component calls setState inside useEffect
console_warnings.impact: Non-blocking - pages still load and function correctly
console_warnings.note: Known issue from previous iterations - does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Admin Ativacoes page loads at /ativacoes with portability toggle (data-testid='portability-toggle')
Clicking portability toggle shows DDD input (data-testid='port-ddd-input') and Numero input (data-testid='port-number-input')
Portability toggle toggles back and hides DDD/Numero fields
Self-service /ativar page loads with step indicator (1 Chip, 2 Dados, 3 Pagamento, 4 Status)
Self-service validates chip ICCID and shows step 2 with portability toggle (data-testid='selfservice-portability-toggle')
Clicking portability toggle on self-service shows DDD (data-testid='selfservice-port-ddd') and Numero (data-testid='selfservice-port-number') inputs
POST /api/ativacao accepts portability=true, port_ddd, port_number fields
POST /api/public/ativacao accepts portability=true, port_ddd, port_number fields
Chips page search input (data-testid='chip-search-input') filters by ICCID typing last 4 digits
Chips page shows '3 resultados para 9634' when filtering
Portal login page loads correctly at /portal
critical_code_review_comments: Portability fields correctly implemented in ActivationRequest model (line 289-294 in server.py)
SelfServiceActivationRequest model also has portability, port_ddd, port_number fields (line 2658-2660)
Portability status endpoint at /api/portabilidade/status/{numero_ou_iccid} works correctly
Mock adapter returns random portability statuses for testing
Chips page search uses client-side filtering which works well for the current data size

success_rate.backend: 100% (15/15 tests passed, 2 skipped due to chip availability)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing chips and clients
context_for_next_testing_agent: Portability feature fully tested. Admin Ativacoes page has portability toggle that shows/hides DDD and Numero inputs. Self-service /ativar page also has portability toggle on step 2 (Dados). Backend accepts portability fields in both /api/ativacao and /api/public/ativacao. Portability status endpoint at /api/portabilidade/status/{numero_ou_iccid} returns mock data. Chips page search filters client-side by ICCID, MSISDN, or client name. Console warning about 'Maximum update depth exceeded' is known and non-blocking.

mocked_apis_list: Ta Telecom API (activation, saldo, consumo, portabilidade status)
